# GitHub Metadata

This folder contains the issue templates and pull request template used by the RecSys Examples repository.

## Issue Templates

The issue templates under `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` collect the minimum information needed to triage bug reports, documentation requests, feature requests, and general questions.

Keep the footer links aligned with the root [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Pull Request Template

`PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` reminds contributors to describe the change, link related issues, add or update tests, and keep documentation current.
